skills.name: movk-core
skills.description: Use @movk/core, a tree-shakable TypeScript utility library — type guards (validators), array/async/css/url utilities, string/object/tree/markdown transformers, object/path/file helpers, and Vue composables. Use when picking a utility, converting flat data to a tree, transforming naming cases, parsing or building URLs, deep cloning or merging objects, or calling @movk/core composables.
